PowerShell(cd D:\\DATN2\\fingerprinter; Get-Content scan_results.jsonl | ForEach-Object { $_ | python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(d.get\('target','?'\), '|', len\(d.get\('techs',[]\)\), 'techs |', d.get\('stats',{}\).get\('elapsed_s','?'\), 's'\)" })

PowerShell($start = Get-Date; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://28tech.com.vn/" -TimeoutSec 15 -SkipCertificateCheck -UseBasicParsing -UserAgent "Mozilla/5.0"; "status: $\($r.StatusCode\), bytes: $\($r.RawContentLength\)" } catch { "ERROR: $_" }; "elapsed: $\(\(\(Get-Date\) - $start\).TotalSeconds\) s")

PowerShell([System.Net.ServicePointManager]::ServerCertificateValidationCallback = {$true}; $start = Get-Date; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://28tech.com.vn/" -TimeoutSec 15 -UseBasicParsing -UserAgent "Mozilla/5.0"; "status: $\($r.StatusCode\), bytes: $\($r.RawContentLength\)" } catch { "ERROR: $_" }; "elapsed: $\(\(\(Get-Date\) - $start\).TotalSeconds\) s")

PowerShell(cd D:\\DATN2\\fingerprinter; $start = Get-Date; python -m fp.cli pipeline --bulk https://28tech.com.vn 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 30; "elapsed: $\(\(\(Get-Date\) - $start\).TotalSeconds\) s")

Bash(powershell -Command 'Get-Process python* -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, @{Name='\\''CPUs'\\''; Expression={[math]::Round\($_.CPU, 1\)}}, @{Name='\\''MemMB'\\''; Expression={[math]::Round\($_.WorkingSet/1MB\)}}')

Bash(sqlite3 fingerprints.db "SELECT t.id, t.template_id, m.id, m.values FROM templates t JOIN requests r ON r.template_pk=t.id JOIN matchers m ON m.request_pk=r.id WHERE m.values LIKE '%Open.Journal.Systems%' LIMIT 5;")

PowerShell(Get-Content D:\\DATN2\\fingerprinter\\scan_results.jsonl | ForEach-Object { try { $j = $_ | ConvertFrom-Json; if \($j.target -eq "https://2dep.vn"\) { $j.endpoints | Where-Object { $_.path -match "\\.\(js|css\)" } | Select-Object -First 30 | ConvertTo-Json } } catch {} } | Select-Object -First 60)
